tool_args.label: MTA METRO-NORTH RAILROAD 2022 YEAR-END REPORT SUMMARY

payload.title: MTA METRO-NORTH RAILROAD 2022 YEAR-END REPORT SUMMARY
payload.description: MTA Metro-North Railroad 2022 year-end financial and operational report covering non-reimbursable and reimbursable financial performance, ridership, overtime, positions, safety, security, on-time performance, equipment reliability, stations operations, customer communications, and capital commitments.
Metro-North Railroad (Metro-North) operates commuter rail service east and west of Hudson River.

warnings: entity.parent_organization is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Parent organizations are relation context. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

payload.description: Receives subsidy payments from Metro-North resulting from inflationary adjustments and a legal settlement with a tenant railroad.
Connecticut Department of Transportation operates Shoreline East Service using M8 rail cars. Provides reimbursements to Metro-North for capital projects.
Provides expense recoveries to Metro-North and receives reimbursements.

tool_args.label: Grand Central Terminal Train Shed Sector 1 roof replacement

payload.project_name: Grand Central Terminal Train Shed Sector 1 roof replacement
payload.location: Grand Central Terminal train shed on East 47th and East 48th Streets
payload.description: Construction of the Grand Central Terminal Train Shed Sector 1 roof replacement project, encompassing the complete replacement of the roof over the train shed on East 47th and East 48th Streets. First stage of priority repairs completed and inspection process for next stage begun.

location_normalized.raw_text: Grand Central Terminal train shed on East 47th and East 48th Streets

tool_args.label: Enhanced Station Initiative at White Plains station

payload.project_name: Enhanced Station Initiative at White Plains station
payload.description: Construction of an extension to the island platform as well as a new side platform, lobby and plaza enhancements. Part of a multi-year design-build contract including enhancements at five passenger stations on the Hudson, Harlem, and New Haven Lines.

tool_args.label: Harmon to Poughkeepsie Signal System Project

payload.project_name: Harmon to Poughkeepsie Signal System Project
payload.description: Capital project on the Hudson Line with lower than expected project activity.
Capital track program on the New Haven Line in Connecticut with lower than expected project activity.

Enhances Metro-North service by providing a link directly to Penn Station on the New Haven line. Includes addition of 4 new ADA stations in the East Bronx as well as significant infrastructure enhancements.

NYC legal agreements executed in July 2022. Inspection and flag reports completed and submitted. Design-Build Construction Contract awarded in December 2022. The Park Avenue Viaduct is the main artery of the Metro-North system and carries all trains into and out of Grand Central Terminal.

Contracted for acquisition of 19 dual-mode locomotives, with options to acquire an additional 32 for Metro-North plus additional for LIRR, CDOT, and NYSDOT. Will replace 31 Genesis locomotives purchased in 1995. Delivery anticipated to begin Q2 2025.

tool_args.label: Metro-North and LIRR TrainTime apps merged

payload.description: Successfully merged Metro-North and Long Island Rail Road's TrainTime apps along with the ticket-buying functionality of MTA eTix into one seamless app experience, now known as TrainTime.

tool_args.label: Confidential Close Call Reporting System (C3RS) 2022 reports

payload.description: Since its implementation in 2017, the Confidential Close Call Reporting System (C3RS) has processed a total of 66,678 reports, including 640 reports in 2022.

payload.claim_text: Consist Compliance Rate, which is the percentage of cars required for service and providing seats for customers each day, was consistently at 100 percent.
payload.statement: Consist Compliance Rate was consistently at 100 percent in 2022.

tool_args.label: Customer Service Station Ambassador Program permanent

payload.claim_text: The Customer Service Station Ambassador Program is now permanent and creates a seamless customer experience by providing assistance at key outlying stations.
payload.statement: 60 total Station Ambassador/Ticket Selling positions spread out over 10 key outlying stations.

warnings: claim.statement is accepted as passthrough, but prefer claim_text. Claim statement.
